p.strong: Implementation Spec: Request Coalescing vs. Naive Fetching
p.em: Engineers: Reference this for Single-Flight implementation logic.

div.p: T=0 : TTL Expires T=1 : N Arrivals T=50: I/O Completes
T=0 : TTL Expires T=1 : N Arrivals (Shared) T=50: Single I/O Completes

ol.li: Map Check: Use a map[string]*call to track active keys.
Wait: Subsequent requests for the same key block on a sync.WaitGroup or channel inside the call struct.
Broadcast: Once the first request finishes, it updates the call result and signals the WaitGroup.
Cleanup: Remove the key from the map before returning to allow future updates.
